Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Juan Henao. Author.

Citation

Manukyan A, Righelli D, Henao J, Billato I, Sales G, Kharuk S, Purdom E, Huber W (2026). fomo: This package allows deploying a set of pre-defined foundation models for various tasks in R. R package version 0.1.0, https://biocfm.github.io/fomo/. 

@Manual{,
  title = {fomo: This package allows deploying a set of pre-defined foundation models for various tasks in R},

On this page
